notes: HumanEval-X Python, Java, and JavaScript benchmark built with 2,952 verification examples.

Narrative sharpening pass completed with a new empirical-study title, conceptual evidence-ladder figure, surprising-findings table, qualitative disagreement table, expanded metric/discussion interpretation, and stronger conclusion.
